English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Chi Psi, Alpha Psi chapter records
Chi Psi. Alpha Psi Chapter
37-4-1124
1.8 cubic feet. 1.8 cubic feet.
1895-1965 Annual reports, histories, correspondence, financial records, personnel records; pledging materials, and photographs. Annual reports; histories, including materials on the 1906 fire; correspondence; financial records; personnel records; pledging materials; and photographs of Chi Psi Fraternity. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 2 - folder 1 ======= 2 - folder 1 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 2072183
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
M.E. Warren
Date completed:
April 1991
EAD encoding:
Martin Heggestad, September 2003
Date modified:
Jude Corina, April 2016
ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
The Alpha Psi Chapter of Chi Psi Fraternity was established at Cornell University in 1869. In 1896, the fraternity moved into the McGraw-Fiske Mansion. On December 6th, 1906, the Chi Psi house caught fire, killing four fraternity brothers and three volunteer fireman.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Annual reports; histories, including materials on the 1906 fire; correspondence; financial records; personnel records; pledging materials; and photographs of Chi Psi Fraternity.
Cite As:
Chi Psi, Alpha Psi chapter records, #37-4-1124. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Access Restrictions:
Access restricted to active members of Chi Psi or by permission of the University Archivist.
Photographs. Students\' societies. Greek letter societies. Chi Psi -- : Fire, 1906. Cornell University -- : Societies, etc. Cornell University -- : Students.
